title: Anchors and href
description: The a element and how to link right.

questions.prompt: Which attribute makes a link open in a new tab?
questions.explanation: target="_blank". Best practice: pair with rel="noopener" for security.

questions.prompt: Which link goes to the section with id="pricing" on the SAME page?
Which URL is RELATIVE to the current page?
questions.code:
A) href="https://x.com/a"
B) href="//x.com/a"
C) href="/about"
D) href="about.html"
questions.explanation: 'about.html' has no leading slash or scheme — resolved relative to the current URL.

questions.prompt: Make this open in a new tab safely (no reverse tabnabbing).
questions.explanation: target="_blank" rel="noopener" — noopener prevents the opened page from accessing window.opener.
